outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump calls Iranian response to US peace proposal 'totally unacceptable'
outlets.summary: CNN live coverage of Trump's Truth Social rejection of Iran's counterproposal submitted via Pakistan. Iran offered partial uranium transfer but rejected dismantlement. Trump accused Iran of '47 years of delay.' Peace talks at full impasse.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump calls Iran's response to peace plan 'unacceptable' as ceasefire is tested
outlets.summary: WaPo reports on the collapse of diplomatic hopes as Trump rejected Iran's counterproposal. Araghchi said US ceasefire violations 'added to suspicions.' Netanyahu simultaneously said war 'not over' in 60 Minutes.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump rejects Iran's response to ceasefire proposal — calls it 'totally unacceptable'
outlets.summary: NPR reports Trump's Truth Social rejection of Iran's counterproposal following its transmission via Pakistani mediator. Iran had offered uranium transfer to third country but refused to dismantle enrichment infrastructure.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says US strikes on Iran were a 'love tap,' as ceasefire still in effect
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump's dismissal of May 7 Qeshm/Bandar Abbas strikes as a 'love tap.' Emphasizes ceasefire still technically in effect despite escalations. Reports IRGC warning that missiles are 'locked onto' US targets.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Trump rejects Iran's latest counteroffer to end the war: 'I don't like it'
outlets.summary: CNBC reports on Trump's rejection and its market impact. Brent fell to $100.49 as deal hopes collapsed. Hormuz blockade Day 70 now without clear end date.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran replies to US proposal to end war, Trump finds response 'unacceptable'
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers the diplomatic collapse: Iran submitted 10-point counterproposal via Pakistan demanding end to all fronts, Hormuz safety, sanctions lift. Trump immediately rejected it. Fundamental disagreement on nuclear dismantlement remains.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire under strain as Gulf states report drone attacks
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports on Iran's simultaneous drone attacks on Qatar, UAE, Kuwait while submitting peace counterproposal. Qatar cargo ship hit. UAE shot down 2 drones. Kuwait repelled airspace incursion.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Iran submitted response to US peace plan proposal — report
outlets.summary: Bloomberg reports Iran offered to transfer enriched uranium to a third country — but rejected dismantling enrichment facilities. Trump's immediate rejection ended the diplomatic window.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF Says It Hit Over 20 Hezbollah Targets in Lebanon; 36 Killed
outlets.summary: Haaretz live coverage of IDF strikes killing 39 across Lebanon — deadliest day since ceasefire. IDF Chief Zamir: 'There is no ceasefire in Lebanon.' Israel-Lebanon second-stage talks confirmed for Washington May 14-15.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: UAE, Kuwait and Qatar all report drone attacks as Iran ramps up its threats
outlets.summary: ToI reports Iran drone attacks on three Gulf states simultaneously — timed with submission of peace counterproposal. Analysis of IRGC strategy: escalate while negotiating.

outlets.name: Ynet
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran war 'not over' until enriched uranium is removed
outlets.summary: Ynet covers Netanyahu's 60 Minutes interview: 'Not over' until uranium removed, enrichment sites dismantled. 'You go in, and you take it out.' Seeks to draw down to zero US financial support.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Top general tells Ayatollah Khamenei: Armed Forces ready to crush any aggression
outlets.summary: Press TV reports Mojtaba Khamenei met Maj. Gen. Abdollahi and issued new military directives. Designed to counter US claims Khamenei is injured/hiding. Shows Supreme Leader as active and in command.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran submits response to US peace proposal via Pakistan; demands end to all fronts
outlets.summary: IRNA reports Iran's formal submission of counterproposal via Pakistani mediator demanding end to war across all fronts including Lebanon, Hormuz shipping safety, sanctions lifting. State media called response 'realistic and positive.'

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian vows Iran will never bow to enemy despite negotiations
outlets.summary: Press TV broadcasts Pezeshkian's defiant statement alongside peace counterproposal submission: 'We will never bow our heads before the enemy.' Iran frames negotiations as strength, not concession.
